query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A human figure stands near the edge of a body of water, with vertical posts and a horizontal rail visible in the lower right foreground. The water meets the sky at a horizon line across the middle of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An intentionally motion-blurred photograph shows a solitary figure dissolving into soft focus at the shoreline of a body of water, with a railing in the foreground similarly smeared into indistinction. The image employs muted, desaturated tones and oppressive low contrast to create a heavy, suffocating atmosphere that evokes melancholy and atmospheric distress.
